flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Caldwell University fell 35% between 2006 and 2009 (44.4% → 28.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Caldwell University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.9k → $40.8k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Caldwell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
